common.tagline: Know What to Wear. Every Day.

meta.title: Matchic — Know What to Wear. Every Day.
meta.description: Standing in front of your closet with nothing to wear? Matchic uses private AI to suggest outfits from clothes you already own. No uploads. No tracking.

meta.twitterTitle: Matchic — Know What to Wear. Every Day.
meta.twitterDescription: Staring at your closet with nothing to wear? AI outfit suggestions from your own wardrobe. No cloud. No tracking.

hero.eyebrow: AI Outfit Suggestions from Your Own Closet
hero.title: Standing in Front of a Full Closet with Nothing to Wear?
hero.subtitle: Matchic suggests outfits from clothes you already own — powered by AI that lives on your phone. No uploads. No tracking. No account needed.

problem.title: 7:15 AM. Running Late. Staring at Clothes You Forgot You Had.
problem.subtitle: Most people wear the same few outfits while 80% of their wardrobe sits untouched. Not because the clothes are bad — because you forgot they exist.

wardrobeUsed.label: of wardrobe typically worn. The rest? Forgotten.

moneyWasted.label: spent yearly on clothes that go unworn

timeDeciding.label: every morning deciding what to wear

fashionWaste.label: of fashion ends up unworn in the first year

withoutMatchic.title: 7:15 AM: The Panic
withoutMatchic.description: Open closet. Stare. Close closet. Repeat. End up wearing the same thing you wore yesterday. Leave 15 minutes late.

withMatchic.title: 7:15 AM: The Smile
withMatchic.description: Open app. Swipe through AI-suggested outfits. Pick one. Get dressed in 2 minutes. Leave on time, looking sharp.
points: Wearing something you forgot you had

solution.title: Matchic Remembers Everything So You Don't Have To
solution.subtitle: Snap your clothes once. Matchic catalogs them, tags them automatically, and suggests outfits every morning — from what you actually own.
points: Snap a photo — AI recognizes every item instantly
Get outfit suggestions for any occasion
Track what you wear. Shop smarter. Waste less.
Everything stays on your phone. Always.

wardrobe.title: Snap Your Wardrobe
wardrobe.description: Photograph your clothes. One by one or in batches. Matchic identifies colors, styles, materials — instantly.

outfit.title: Get Outfit Ideas
outfit.description: Tell Matchic the occasion: work, date, gym, lazy Sunday. It suggests combinations from your actual clothes.

track.title: Track & Improve
track.description: Log what you wear. See what you never use. Build a wardrobe you actually love.

outfitGenerator.title: AI Outfit Generator
outfitGenerator.description: Stuck on what to wear? Matchic suggests combinations from your real wardrobe — not from a store catalog.

autoTagging.title: Smart Auto-Tagging
autoTagging.description: Point your camera at any piece. Matchic identifies the category, color, material, and style automatically.

wardrobeInsights.title: Wardrobe Insights
wardrobeInsights.description: See what you wear most, what sits unused, and how much of your closet you actually use.

offlineFirst.title: Offline First
offlineFirst.description: Works on a plane, in a basement, anywhere. No internet needed. Ever.

noAccount.title: No Account Needed
noAccount.description: Open the app and start. No email, no password, no cloud sync.

dataOwnership.title: Your Data, Your Rules
dataOwnership.description: Export, backup, or delete everything anytime. Your wardrobe data belongs to you.

privacy.title: Your Photos Never Leave Your Phone
privacy.subtitle: Matchic processes everything on your phone. We physically cannot see your photos because we don't have servers.

onDevice.title: On-Device AI
onDevice.description: AI runs directly on your phone. Nothing is sent to the internet.

offline.title: Works Offline
offline.description: Use Matchic on a plane, in a basement, anywhere. No connection needed.

dataControl.title: You Control Your Data
dataControl.description: Export, backup, or delete everything anytime. It's yours.

sustainability.title: Wear More. Buy Less.
sustainability.subtitle: Matchic helps you maximize what you own. Less waste, less spending, more confidence.

shopYourCloset.title: Shop Your Closet
shopYourCloset.description: Discover new combinations from clothes you already have.

trackUsage.title: Track Usage
trackUsage.description: See what you never wear. Make conscious decisions about what to keep.

capsuleWardrobe.title: Capsule Wardrobe
capsuleWardrobe.description: Build a smaller, more versatile wardrobe. Quality over quantity.

consciousChoices.title: Conscious Choices
consciousChoices.description: Every purchase decision matters. Buy less, wear more, waste nothing.

dataOwnership.title: Your Wardrobe, Your Rules
dataOwnership.subtitle: Your data lives on your device. Not our servers. Not the cloud. Your phone.

dataControl.title: Your Wardrobe, Your Rules
dataControl.description: Export everything. Backup locally. Or wipe it all. Your choice.

waitlist.title: Be the First to Try Matchic
waitlist.subtitle: Join the waitlist and be notified when Matchic launches. No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.

form.privacyNote: We won't share your email. We won't track you. We don't even have a server.
form.success: You're on the list! We'll email you when Matchic is ready.
form.error: Please enter a valid email address.

free.question: Is Matchic really free?
free.answer: Yes. Matchic is free to use. We don't sell data because we don't collect any.

offline.question: Does it work without internet?
offline.answer: Yes. Matchic works entirely offline. AI processing, photo storage, outfit generation — everything happens on your phone.

photos.question: Where are my photos stored?
photos.answer: On your phone only. We don't have servers. We don't upload anything. Your wardrobe stays on your device.

accuracy.question: How accurate is the AI?
accuracy.answer: Matchic recognizes colors, patterns, and clothing categories with high accuracy. It's not perfect, but it gets better as you use it.

wardrobeSize.question: How many items can I add?
wardrobeSize.answer: As many as you want. Matchic handles wardrobes of all sizes — from 20 items to 2,000.

export.question: Can I export my wardrobe data?
export.answer: Yes. Your wardrobe data is stored locally and can be exported or backed up anytime. You own your data.

trust.question: Can I trust Matchic with my data?
trust.answer: Yes. All your wardrobe photos stay on your phone. We don't have servers, so we can't access your data even if we wanted to.

platforms.question: Will Matchic be available on iOS?
platforms.answer: Yes. We are building for both iOS and Android. Join the waitlist to be notified.

finalCta.title: Ready to Know Your Wardrobe?
finalCta.subtitle: Join the waitlist. Be the first to experience a smarter closet.

collect.title: What We Collect
collect.content: Matchic is designed to collect as little data as possible. Here's what we handle:

doNot.title: What We Do Not Do
doNot.content: We do not upload your photos to any server. We do not track your behavior or location. We do not sell or share your data with third parties. We do not use analytics or advertising cookies.

choices.title: Your Choices
choices.content: You can use Matchic without creating an account. You can delete your wardrobe data at any time. You can unsubscribe from waitlist emails anytime.

usage.title: Using Matchic
usage.content: By using Matchic, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the app.

limitations.title: Limitations
limitations.content: Outfit suggestions are recommendations, not guarantees. AI recognition may not always be perfect. We are not responsible for fashion choices made using the app.

license.title: License Grant
license.content: Matchic grants you a personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the app on your own devices.

data.title: Your Data
data.content: All wardrobe photos and data are stored locally on your device. We do not have access to your content.
